name: UwsPrmRateSubjAreaBalSumLoad

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.Zz7v_TMP_UwsPrmRateSubjAreaBalSumLoad;WITH main_in AS ( SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_AREA_NM, BAL_DT, ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_UWSOwner}.TBL_BAL_SUM WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.Target}' AND SUBJ_AREA_NM = '@{pipeline().parameters.Subject}' ), ref_balSum AS ( SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_AREA_NM, COUNT(*) AS ROW_COUNT FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_UWSOwner}.TBL_BAL_SUM WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.Target}' AND SUBJ_AREA_NM = '@{pipeline().parameters.Subject}' GROUP BY TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_AREA_NM ), joined AS ( SELECT m.TRGT_SYS_CD, m.SUBJ_AREA_NM, m.BAL_DT, m.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD, r.ROW_COUNT FROM main_in m JOIN ref_balSum r ON r.TRGT_SYS_CD = m.TRGT_SYS_CD AND r.SUBJ_AREA_NM = m.SUBJ_AREA_NM ), ordered AS ( SELECT j.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY j.BAL_DT ASC) AS rn FROM joined j ), rCTE AS (   SELECT o.rn, o.TRGT_SYS_CD, o.SUBJ_AREA_NM, o.BAL_DT, o.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD, o.ROW_COUNT,     CASE       WHEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), o.BAL_DT, 120) <> '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' THEN 'NEXT ROW'       WHEN o.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD = 'BAL' THEN 'BAL'       WHEN o.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD = 'IN' THEN 'IN'       ELSE 'OUT'     END AS svTempTlrncCd,     CASE       WHEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), o.BAL_DT,120) = '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' THEN 'Y'       WHEN o.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD='BAL' THEN 'Y'       WHEN o.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD='IN' THEN 'Y'       ELSE 'N'     END AS svTempRslvIn,     CASE       WHEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), o.BAL_DT,120) = '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' THEN 'NA'       WHEN o.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD='BAL' THEN 'BAL'       WHEN o.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD='IN' THEN 'IN'       ELSE 'OUT'     END AS svTempRslvIncd,     0 AS svPrevCount,     1 AS svCurrCount   FROM ordered o   WHERE o.rn=1   UNION ALL   SELECT o.rn, o.TRGT_SYS_CD, o.SUBJ_AREA_NM, o.BAL_DT, o.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD, o.ROW_COUNT,     CASE       WHEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), o.BAL_DT, 120) <> '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' THEN 'NEXT ROW'       WHEN p.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD='BAL' AND p.svTempTlrncCd<>'OUT' AND p.svTempTlrncCd<>'IN' THEN 'BAL'       WHEN p.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD='BAL' AND p.svTempTlrncCd='IN' THEN 'IN'       WHEN p.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD='IN'  AND p.svTempTlrncCd<>'OUT' THEN 'IN'       ELSE 'OUT'     END AS svTempTlrncCd,     CASE       WHEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), o.BAL_DT,120) = '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' THEN 'Y'       WHEN p.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD='BAL' AND p.svTempRslvIncd<>'OUT' THEN 'Y'       WHEN p.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD='IN' AND p.svTempRslvIncd<>'OUT' THEN 'Y'       ELSE 'N'     END AS svTempRslvIn,     CASE       WHEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), o.BAL_DT,120) = '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' THEN 'NA'       WHEN p.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD='BAL' AND p.svTempRslvIncd<>'OUT' AND p.svTempRslvIncd<>'IN' THEN 'BAL'       WHEN p.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD='BAL' AND p.svTempRslvIncd='IN' THEN 'IN'       WHEN p.ROW_CT_TLRNC_CD='IN'  AND p.svTempRslvIncd<>'OUT' THEN 'IN'       ELSE 'OUT'     END AS svTempRslvIncd,     p.svCurrCount AS svPrevCount,     p.svCurrCount + 1 AS svCurrCount   FROM rCTE p   JOIN ordered o ON o.rn = p.rn + 1 ), finalRow AS ( SELECT * FROM rCTE WHERE rn = ROW_COUNT ) SELECT '@{pipeline().parameters.Target}' AS TRGT_SYS_CD, '@{pipeline().parameters.Subject}' AS SUBJ_AREA_NM, CONVERT(DATETIME, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}',120) AS LAST_BAL_DT, finalRow.svTempTlrncCd AS TLRNC_CD, finalRow.svTempRslvIn AS PREV_ISSUE_CRCTD_IN, @{pipeline().parameters.ExtrRunCycle} AS TRGT_RUN_CYC_NO, CONVERT(DATETIME, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}',120) AS CRT_DTM, CONVERT(DATETIME, '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}',120) AS LAST_UPDT_DTM, 'ETLUSER' AS USER_ID INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.Zz7v_TMP_UwsPrmRateSubjAreaBalSumLoad FROM finalRow;

Description:

CALLED BY:   FctsPrmRateBalCntl

PROCESSING:
                  
                The Job loads the SUBJECT_AREA_BAL_SUM table after the balancing control job is done for a given Subject Area

Annotations:
Job Name: IdsIdsWCdmEtlDrvrLoad
